---
title: "Example: Gamma nested bootstrap CV (template)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose

This is a minimal runnable example showing how to call the core function
`nested_bootstrap_cv_gamma()` on toy data (no real project data).

```{r}
source("R/10_cv_gamma.R")


set.seed(1)
df <- data.frame(
  y  = rexp(40, rate = 1/200) + 1,  # positive, right-skewed outcome
  x1 = rnorm(40),
  x2 = rnorm(40)
)

model_formulas <- list(
  "Model 1" = y ~ x1,
  "Model 2" = y ~ x2,
  "Model 3" = y ~ x1 + x2
)

res <- nested_bootstrap_cv_gamma(
  data = df,
  model_formulas = model_formulas,
  outcome_var = "y",
  B = 50,         # small for demo; increase in real use
  seed = 123,
  scale_predictors = TRUE,
  guardrail = "na",
  min_y = 1, max_y = 900,
  high_error_threshold = 300
)

res$robust_summary
res$prop_high_mae
res$model_frequencies
